title: The Tale of Mr. Jeremy Fisher
summaries: "The Tale of Mr. Jeremy Fisher" by Beatrix Potter is a children's book published in 1906. Jeremy Fisher, a frog living in a "slippy-sloppy" house at a pond's edge, sets out on a rainy day to catch minnows for a dinner party with friends. Sailing across the pond on his lily-pad boat, he encounters unexpected setbacks and a dangerous trout that nearly swallows him whole. His fishing expedition becomes a struggle for survival in this charming tale of nature's unpredictable dangers. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
